analysis.reasoning: Core message: The tweet lists the agenda for an upcoming European Council meeting, highlighting major issues (COVID-19, climate change, external relations with Turkey and the US, security/terrorism) and provides meeting info. Evaluation: EU1 (successful story) – Not promoted; no reference to past successes or historical achievements. EU2 (union) – Implicitly suggests coordinated action by EU leaders meeting together, but it does not explicitly emphasize unity or agreement; evidence is too thin to claim promotion. EU3 (useful for citizens) – Partly aligns, as it showcases a practical, proactive agenda addressing citizens’ concerns (pandemic, climate, security), indicating the EU is acting on key issues; this fits the narrative of usefulness within the EU. EU4 (avant-garde) – Not claimed; no leadership/pioneering language. EU5 (global champion of fair causes) – Not addressed. EU6 (contributes to a better world) – The mention of external relations hints at global role, but the tweet doesn’t claim contributions to global well-being; insufficient. Conclusion: The tweet promotes EU3.
